title: DarknessUtilsPlus
body:
# DarknessUtilsPlus
This is the porting of the mod "DarknessUtils" to other versions of Minecraft to keep it up to date and to stay useful for AC players. Originally developed by [**Der_s**](https://modrinth.com/user/DersWasTaken) but was ported and updated by a passionate Autcraft player.

This mod tries to implement QOL improvements for AC players during darkness fights. Currently the only feature is highlighting boss mobs during darkness fights.

# Features

- Boss Highlights
- Command: /glow
- Works in the Darkness Fights

![A glowing parrot called Ocean Prince](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85a3da6208e395ecfddd4bef4d093e3d61a423f1.png)
